eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange and currentValue.value:
		system.tag.writeAsync(["[.]Ocmd_Stop"], [False])

if not initialChange and currentValue.value:
		system.tag.writeAsync(["[.]Ocmd_Start"], [False])
